findings.message: AGENTS.md exists but Claude Code will never read it.
findings.recommendation: Add a one-line CLAUDE.md containing `@AGENTS.md`. A symlink also works for reading; the import is slightly safer because Claude Code refuses to WRITE through symlinks (issue #66559), which only matters if you let it update the file.

findings.message: Zero-exception rule expressed as advisory prose.
findings.recommendation: Keep the line if you accept ~advisory compliance; for zero-exception rules add a hook, lint rule, or CI check.

agentNotes.note: Does not read AGENTS.md natively — needs a CLAUDE.md containing `@AGENTS.md`. Injects CLAUDE.md as an advisory user message (no compliance guarantee); official size target is under 200 lines. Zero-exception rules belong in hooks.
Reads AGENTS.md natively (nearest file wins, 32 KiB cap — this file is 0.1 KiB). Supports AGENTS.override.md for local tweaks.
Reads AGENTS.md natively. Path-scoped rules need .cursor/rules/*.mdc — plain .md files there are silently ignored.
Reads AGENTS.md natively (coding agent, since Aug 2025) alongside .github/copilot-instructions.md.
